positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest gathering. Central composition featuring diverse flora and fauna: stylized woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls, rabbits) interacting with bioluminescent mushroom groves and ferns. Strong silhouette definition, vibrant pop colors (teal, magenta, lime green, indigo) set against a deep, twilight-blue backdrop. Line art style mixed with watercolor texture, highly detailed, optimized for repeating pattern use on apparel. High contrast, clean lines, flat graphic elements combined with soft organic textures. Perfect symmetry in the arrangement of elements, centered and balanced.
negative: low detail, blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, cartoonish, realistic photo, sketch
